description: Contextual embedding prefix: prepend hierarchy breadcrumb (Part >  Title > Chapter > Section > Article N - Title) to every indexed document. Same  pipeline as run_17 (para_window reranker, enrichment on, ToC off, alpha=0.5). Tests     whether structural signals baked into the embedding space improve retrieval vs post-hoc title boost. Baseline: run_17 Hit@1=80.35%, MRR=0.840.
